name: Port Occupation Checker
description: Find which process is occupying a network port. Shows PID, process name, and path. Optionally kill the process.

inputs.label: Port Number
inputs.help: The TCP port number to check (1-65535)

inputs.label: Kill the occupying process
inputs.help: ⚠️ WARNING: When enabled, will forcefully terminate the process occupying this port. Leave disabled to only detect.

inputs.label: Force Kill (no confirmation)
inputs.help: Skip confirmation prompt when killing. Only effective when Kill is enabled.
